title: Latency in Agentic Loops
concept: Why agent loops are slow (multiple sequential LLM calls) and strategies to optimize response times.

exercises.prompt: What slows down a conversation with an AI agent?
exercises.explain: Multiple sequential calls can lead to latency because each call takes time to process.

cards.title: What is Latency?
cards.body: Latency is the delay or time taken for an AI agent to respond. It’s like waiting for a friend to reply to a text.

cards.title: Agentic Loops Definition
cards.body: Agentic loops involve an AI making decisions or providing responses based on inputs. Slow loops can lead to delays.

cards.title: Like a Relay Race
cards.body: Imagine a relay race where each runner has to wait for the previous one to finish. If one runner is slow, the whole team is delayed.

cards.title: Sequential Calls Example
cards.body: If an AI needs to confirm three different points one after the other, it may take longer than if it could handle them all at once.

cards.title: Myth: All AI Calls Are Immediate
cards.body: Many believe that all responses from AI happen instantly, but they often require multiple calls that can slow down the process.

cards.title: Latency in Action
cards.body: The more steps an AI has to go through, the longer you wait. Optimize to speed it up!

exercises.prompt: What is one way to reduce latency in agentic loops?
exercises.explain: Minimizing sequential calls reduces the time it takes for the AI to respond, thus lowering latency.

exercises.prompt: True or False: All AI responses happen instantly without delay.
exercises.explain: False. AI responses can take time, especially when multiple calls are involved.

exercises.prompt: Latency in AI responses can often be reduced by __________ sequential calls.
exercises.sentence: Latency in AI responses can often be reduced by minimizing sequential calls.
exercises.explain: Minimizing sequential calls helps the AI respond faster by reducing waiting times.

exercises.prompt: Which statement about agent loops is true?

options.text: They can be slow with many steps.

exercises.explain: Agent loops can be slow if there are many steps involved because each step adds time to the total response.

exercises.prompt: What can you do to improve speed in an agentic loop?

options.text: Minimize the number of sequential calls.

exercises.explain: Minimizing the number of sequential calls allows the AI agent to respond quicker, enhancing overall performance.
